summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after security/code-quality fixes. All 52 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed including cookie-based auth, protected routes, status updates, logout, responsive navbar, and contact details verification.

test_credentials.auth_method: httpOnly cookie (admin_token) with Bearer token fallback

seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 migrated from localStorage Bearer tokens to httpOnly cookies for security. Cookie auth tests in /app/backend/tests/test_cookie_auth.py. Bearer token still works as fallback. Frontend stores only email in sessionStorage (no token in localStorage). Contact details updated to +91 84603 60600 and hello@binanienterprises.in. Responsive navbar switches to hamburger at <1024px (lg: breakpoint).

backend: POST /api/admin/login - sets httpOnly cookie 'admin_token' with HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=lax ✓
POST /api/admin/login - returns {token, email, role} in body ✓
GET /api/admin/me - with cookie only (no Authorization header) returns {email, role} ✓
GET /api/admin/me - with Authorization: Bearer <token> still works (backwards compatibility) ✓
GET /api/admin/me - with neither cookie nor header returns 401 ✓
Public endpoints unchanged (POST /api/bookings, GET /api/bookings, GET /api/stats, POST /api/contact, GET /api/) ✓
All 41 existing tests from iteration 2 still pass ✓
frontend: /admin/bookings without auth redirects to /admin/login (ProtectedRoute calls /admin/me on mount) ✓
/admin/login with correct creds sets cookie and navigates to /admin/bookings ✓
Admin dashboard loads bookings via cookie auth (axios withCredentials: true) ✓
Status update via row Select updates the booking (PATCH) ✓
Logout button calls POST /api/admin/logout and redirects to /admin/login ✓
localStorage contains NO JWT token (only sessionStorage 'binani_admin_email' for UI) ✓
Homepage footer shows phone +91 84603 60600 and email hello@binanienterprises.in ✓
/book page shows phone +91 84603 60600 and email hello@binanienterprises.in ✓
At 1280px: Desktop nav visible, hamburger hidden ✓
At 1023px: Hamburger visible, desktop nav hidden ✓
At 800px: No horizontal scroll, hamburger menu visible ✓
Booking success screen shows user name ✓
